basket_rule: The five names form one inseparable demonstration basket. Confidence is ordinal, not a probability. No order will be sent.

instruction.no_chase: If the closing-auction cutoff is missed, wait for a new completed-close scan.
cancel_if: The complete basket cannot be implemented

recommendations.event_risk: HIGH · guidance cut and CFO departure

audit.message: Demonstration holdout evidence was sealed for replay.
Five-name paper basket created from the completed daily bar.

horizons.title: Five-session reversal basket
horizons.entry_rule: Revalidate at 15:30–15:45 ET and submit the complete basket as MOC for 2026-07-16.
horizons.review_rule: Refresh after every completed daily bar; confidence is ordinal, not a probability.
horizons.exit_rule: Exit the complete basket MOC on 2026-07-23 unless a risk cancellation occurs.
horizons.evidence: Demonstration of the promoted five-day basket contract; individual ranks are not standalone forecasts.
invalidation: The complete basket cannot be implemented
horizons.unlock_requirement: Available only for the complete basket and exact timing contract.

horizons.title: No validated monthly stock recommendation
horizons.entry_rule: Do not stretch the five-day reversal signal into a one-month trade.
horizons.review_rule: Wait for an independently frozen monthly model and untouched forward evidence.
horizons.exit_rule: No monthly exit is authorized because no monthly recommendation is emitted.
horizons.evidence: The promoted campaign did not validate a standalone 21-session stock-selection model.
invalidation: Any monthly ticker inferred from the weekly ranking is invalid.
horizons.unlock_requirement: Requires preregistration, costs, OOS validation, confirmation, freeze, and a new holdout.

horizons.title: No validated one-year stock recommendation
horizons.entry_rule: Do not use a five-day oversold move as a one-year investment thesis.
horizons.review_rule: Require point-in-time fundamentals and a separately validated long-horizon model.
horizons.exit_rule: No annual exit is authorized because no annual recommendation is emitted.
horizons.evidence: EdgeStack has no frozen promoted 252-session single-stock model in this campaign.
invalidation: Any annual ticker inferred from the weekly ranking is invalid.
horizons.unlock_requirement: Requires a new causal annual study, full cost/OOS gauntlet, freeze, and future holdout.

alignments.evidence: No promoted 252-session regime or stock-selection model exists.
The five-session reversal basket has a sealed PASS holdout.
Fresh quotes, membership, news, halts, and MOC availability require pre-close revalidation.

sniper.release_condition: Remain NO TRADE until all four layers are independently validated and pass on the same causal snapshot.
sniper.stop_warning: Planned loss is a sizing budget, not a guarantee. Stops can gap, slip, whipsaw, or fail to execute at the trigger price.

disclaimer: EdgeStack is for research and educational purposes only. It is NOT financial advice. No trading edge is guaranteed; documented anomalies decay after publication (McLean & Pontiff 2016 found returns 58% lower post-publication) and often disappear after realistic transaction costs. Most classic technical analysis has no standalone edge on liquid US large caps after costs; timing overlays here are for execution, timing, and risk management, not alpha generation. Backtests use free, survivorship-biased data unless stated otherwise and overstate real performance. Live alerts are computed from free, potentially 15-minute-delayed data and may be stale or wrong; a 'recommendation holds' confirmation is a statistical statement, not a promise. Past performance does not predict future results. Do not trade real capital based on this output without independent professional advice and your own due diligence.
